replies.msg:
屌咗啦，佢厚面皮式回覆：


Thanks !!

We are giving our Hong Kong backers an option that other backers cannot receive, which is to meet our team and look at other products (and receive a credit towards their next direct purchase with us, for the shipping fee amount). You had the option to have your parcel delivered (as expected), or take advantage of the open day offer we have made (however, I would note here that Covid-19 has really affected the responses, and we cannot lay on the food and drinks that we wanted to plan for the open days - apologies for this).

We will proceed to deliver your parcel as expected !

試咗塊vnd喺EF1740喺17mm 刻度去到5過多少少就會出十字紋, 28mm依然見到十字。而且過4之後暗角都開始明顯

另外買咗46-62上67-82嘅vnd係有機會甩, 建議唔好adapt再adapt

結論vnd用喺 =>50mm 比較理想, wide鏡nd開唔盡+暗角明顯
